annotations.label: Divergence theorem (statement)

anchor.snippet: If F is a continuously differentiable vector field defined on a neighborhood of V

annotations.note: Mathlib has the divergence theorem only for rectangular boxes in ℝⁿ⁺¹, not for general regions V with smooth boundary as stated.

annotations.label: Divergence theorem for bounded open subsets of Euclidean space
annotations.note: Only the box (product-of-intervals) special case is formalized; general bounded open subsets with piecewise-smooth boundary are not.

annotations.label: Divergence theorem for compact Riemannian manifolds with boundary
annotations.note: Mathlib has no Stokes/divergence theorem for compact Riemannian manifolds with boundary; only the Euclidean box version exists.
